message.content:
The sky colors are dominating the top. Let me look at the bottom portion where the ground and spheres should be.

{"analysis":"The top 600 rows are all sky colors. The ground and spheres must be in the lower portion. Let me examine more of the image, especially row ranges that have different colors.","plan":"1. Sample rows from different parts of the image
2. Look for non-sky colored rows
3. The bottom of the image (row ~500-600) should have ground/spheres","commands":[{"keystrokes":"awk 'NR>3{print NR-3, $0}' /app/image.ppm | awk '{row=int((NR-1)/800)+1; if($1!=prev_r || $2!=prev_g || $3!=prev_b){print row, NR, $0; prev_r=$1; prev_g=$2; prev_b=$3}}' | head -60
","duration":1}]}
